sourceManager.title: Repository Sources
sourceManager.empty: No sources yet. Click the "Add" button to start configuring.
sourceManager.selectSource: Please select a repository source from the list above to view images

compressPage.title: Image Compression
compressPage.dropHint: Drag images here or click to select

convertPage.title: Image Conversion
convertPage.dropHint: Drag images here or click to select

workspace.setupHint: Pick a folder as your Pixuli local image workspace. Images are stored under images/ in that directory.
workspace.setupHintWeb: Create a browser-local workspace (OPFS). Images and index stay on this device; clearing site data may remove the workspace.
workspace.setupHintWebLocal: Web supports local workspace only. Connect a folder on your computer (recommended) or create a browser workspace.
workspace.pushNeedsRemote: Add a GitHub or Gitee remote source to push
workspace.pullNeedsRemote: Add a GitHub or Gitee remote source to pull
workspace.syncNeedsRemote: Add a GitHub or Gitee remote source to sync
workspace.migrationHint: You have {{count}} remote source(s). Choose how to continue:
workspace.migrationLocalHint: Pick a folder as your workspace. Existing remote sources will be bound for sync.
workspace.migrationHintWebLocal: You have {{count}} remote source(s). On Web, choose a local workspace first, then sync.
workspace.migrationLocalHintWeb: Connect a local folder or create a browser workspace; existing remotes will be bound for sync.
workspace.migrationPullAfter: Pull all images from remote after setup (may take a while)
